title: Populating one column based on values in another
excerpt:

posts.author: GCummings (Georgie Cummings)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. I tried to Google this but didn’t have much luck. Please let me know if what I am trying to achieve is possible.

Board A tracks order progress. Board B has list of customers with respective account numbers. I would like to enter the account number in a column in Board A and have it automatically populate the name of the customer in another column also in Board A. But it would need to pull the info from Board B.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GCummings - look into Connect Board and Mirror columns, this should solve your issue.

Hope this helps,
Mark
